prs.title: Bug fix: always show home screen after being killed by OS in background.
Bug fix: Ensure model download button is interactable
Add Firebase Analytics logging for Agent Chat on Android.
Add ModelCapability and capabilityToTaskTypes to Model and ModelAllowlist.
Improve model variant download button animation/transition between different states.
Sort models in global model manager by their orders in allowlist.
Add support for showing related models in a single model card.
Fix a bug in how data is passed to a JavaScript function.
[Android] Handle FCM data messages with deeplinks and custom content.
Show a dedicated "Initializing model" screen on first model load.
Set defaultl runtime to litertlm for imported models.
Enable sending messages with only audio clips.
Update max tokens slider minimum and improve config dialog UI. The ConfigDialog now displays the minimum value of the slider range and includes horizontal padding for the slider.

Support thinking mode in the chat panel. This change introduces a new `ChatMessageThinking` type, which allows displaying a collapsable section for the agent's thought process. The section automatically expands when the thinking is in progress and can be manually toggled by the user. It also allows user to scroll back and view the thought process while the model is generating output.
Remove deprecated experimental flag for NPU in Kotlin
Use model's max token as the max number of prefill tokens in benchmark config screen.
Update empty state of various screens.
Add support for "thinking mode" in LLM configurations.
Migrate tools type from List<Any> to List<ToolProvider>
Allow copying selective text in chat
Re-layout text input to align better with ux design.
